article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Feb 6, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association (BGMEA) and SOWTEX along with Confederation of Indian Textile Industries (CITI) have planned two Textile Sourcing Meets'23 and Road Show in India from February 9 to 12.

The event will be led by BGMEA President Faruque Hassan and Vice President Shahidullah Azim along with a team of delegates from Bangladesh RMG Industries.

The BGMEA team is going for close interaction with top Indian Textile Manufacturers in a

llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly quantifies $15 billion of raw-material support from India over 3–5 years, which is a country-level import value of raw materials matching the 'imports' feature scope.

verification.quote_best_match: can contribute $15 billion of raw material support from India in the next 3-5 years.
verification.judge_reasoning: The article states that the initiative "can contribute $15 billion of raw material support from India in the next 3-5 years," which directly implies additional inflow of raw materials from India to Bangladesh (i.e., imports) at a country level.
